title: caroxylon passerinum
intro: Caroxylon passerinum, also known as the 'Natal raisin tree', is a deciduous tree species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Caroxylon passerinum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
